Mapped archive readiness UI to /student/celebration, /student/portfolio, /student/archive, /api/submissions/:id/evidence, /api/evidence/:id/check-access, /api/exports/student-archive, /api/exports/:id/download, and /admin/audit.

Mapped persisted records EvidenceArtifact, Submission, SubmissionVersion, Review, Comment, Requirement, RequirementProgress, Deadline, StudentArchiveExport, ExportRequest, ExportArtifact, AuditEvent, RetentionPolicy, and UserGroupRole.
Corrected fixed-height horizontal rows after readback found clipped child cards.

raw Drive storage identifiers never render
